visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A hand reaches into a pink, cubical dispenser at a cosmetics counter, pulling out a large cluster of sample sachets. The background shows a modern retail environment with brand names visible on counters and signs. (2) Two young women stand in front of a decorative cherry blossom tree inside a department store. One wears a zebra-print bucket hat and a grey sheer top, while the other is in a black top. They hold black shopping bags and gesture excitedly toward the camera. (3) A promotional graphic appears with white background and text in Traditional Chinese, displaying cosmetic bottles and the details of a Mother's Day event. (4) Back at the cosmetics counter, the woman in the hat demonstrates a 'backhand' technique to grab samples. A staff member in a black uniform assists by holding a bag open. The lighting is bright and even. (5) The woman in the hat retrieves an exceptionally large handful of samples, causing her hand to overflow. She looks shocked and thrilled. (6) The scene shifts to a domestic indoor setting where hundreds of sample sachets are neatly laid out in rows on a table. The woman sits behind them, presenting small product bottles to the lens while smiling.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 快要被你拆台了. (2) [Subtitle]: 現在百貨公司週年慶最猛的活動就是植村秀的正貨一把抓. [Logo]: shu uemura. (3) [Slogan]: 2025母親節 百貨限定 好禮一把抓 快閃活動. (4) [Subtitle]: 你抓起來全部都是你的. (5) [Subtitle]: 跟大家講一個小秘訣就是反手可以對抗地心引力喔. (6) [Variety]: 加油. (7) [Subtitle]: 你快要爆了. (8) [Variety]: 哇...太厲害了. [Variety]: 哇靠... (9) [Subtitle]: 這樣是可以的嗎? 我直接原地嚇到. (10) [Subtitle]: 我覺得我沒辦法超越你. (11) [Variety]: 230包. [Variety]: 全部是免費. (12) [Subtitle]: 卸妝油以及粉底液. (13) [Subtitle]: 我覺得真的很好玩.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 store assistant, and 1 passerby in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a black choker and a black top. The other woman wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a grey sheer dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A department store cosmetics section with pink branded displays, a pink cherry blossom tree installation, and a modern home kitchen area with a light-colored countertop.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy female speech overlapping a rhythmic, upbeat electronic BGM track. A 'whoosh' SFX plays as the first handful of items is pulled. The tone is highly celebratory and fast-paced. (2) A transition occurs with a 'pop' SFX as the location changes to the cherry blossom display. The speakers' pitch remains high and energetic. Background mall noise is very low. (3) A 'ding' SFX marks the appearance of promotional text on screen. The music maintains a consistent tempo while the speakers explain the rules of the event with rising intonations. (4) During the second grab attempt, incidental rustling sounds of plastic sachets are clearly audible. One woman shouts with high arousal, followed by a 'sparkle' SFX indicating success. (5) The final phase features a continuous BGM track as the woman summarizes the total haul. The speech rate slows slightly for emphasis, concluding with a cheerful closing remark and fading music.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific Mother's Day flash event by Shu Uemura, showing viewers how much 'free' product can be obtained through a fun participation activity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of a brand-specific event and display of numerous branded products and bags.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing with high-energy audio and bright visuals to appeal to young female shoppers.
